description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. Use two jobs, build-linux and build-macos, with different environments. In build-linux, run on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04, install dependencies with apt-get, and build the project with cmake and make. In build-macos, run on macos-10.15, install dependencies with brew, and build the project with cmake and make.
